description: Zarvis document processing tools. Each tool is available in specific modules.

tools.name: get_raw_document
tools.description: Get the raw content of the most recently uploaded document.

tools.name: save_structured_data
tools.description: Save the parsed structured data as a JSON string. This is the clean, structured version of the document.

data.description: The structured data as a JSON string.

tools.name: get_structured_data
tools.description: Retrieve the previously parsed structured data.

tools.name: save_schema
tools.description: Save the inferred schema as a JSON string.

schema.description: The schema as a JSON string.

tools.name: save_summary
tools.description: Save a human-readable summary of the document.

tools.name: query_structured_data
tools.description: Query the structured data to answer a question. Returns the data for in-context analysis.

query.description: The question to answer about the data.

tools.name: list_documents
tools.description: List all uploaded documents for this session.

tools.name: get_forest_documents
tools.description: Load all documents and their structured data from the active forest. Use this to compare and analyze across documents.

forest_id.description: The forest ID to load documents from.

tools.name: query_forest
tools.description: Query across all documents in a forest to answer a cross-document question.

query.description: The question to answer across all documents.
